description: Provides commands for file system operations within the Bun runtime.

types.description: Content of a file with encoding information.

properties.name: encoding
properties.description: The encoding used for the content.

commands.name: read
commands.description: Reads the content of a file.

parameters.name: filePath
parameters.description: Path to the file to read.

parameters.name: encoding
parameters.description: Encoding format for the file content. Defaults to utf8.

returns.name: content
returns.description: The file content with encoding information.

parameters.name: filePath
parameters.description: Path to the file to write.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Content to write to the file.

parameters.name: encoding
parameters.description: Encoding format for the content. Defaults to utf8.
